description:
OUR CLIENT
  
Our client, Elders, is one of Australia’s most iconic agribusiness companies, renowned for delivering high-quality products and innovative solutions across the agriculture sector. Committed to continuous improvement, Elders invests in technology to enhance efficiency, quality and customer outcomes. As part of their ongoing digital initiatives, Elders is seeking a skilled Automation Tester to join their dynamic technology team and support the development of robust, automated testing solutions across API and web applications.
  
ABOUT THE ROLE

On a 12 month Fixed-Term contract, the Automation Tester will play a key role in ensuring the delivery of high-quality, bug-free software solutions. Reporting to the Enterprise Test Manager, this role involves designing, developing and executing automated test scripts, maintaining test frameworks and collaborating closely with internal teams.
Operating with a high level of technical expertise and autonomy, you will ensure that automation testing supports continuous delivery, reliability and the ongoing enhancement of both internal and customer-facing systems.
Key responsibilities include:
  

Develop, maintain and execute automated tests for API and web applications.
Write robust, reusable and maintainable automation scripts.
Perform API testing using tools such as Postman and Katalon Studio.
Design and implement end-to-end automation solutions for web applications.
Conduct performance, regression and functional testing of API and web systems.
Troubleshoot and resolve issues identified during testing.
Integrate automated test scripts into the CI/CD pipeline.
Provide detailed test reports and documentation, highlighting issues, risks and potential improvements.
Participate in reviews and testing of new features, products and enhancements.
Ensure automation tests remain up-to-date and aligned with evolving project needs.
  
ABOUT YOU
  
To be successful in this role, you will demonstrate:
  

Hands-on experience automating both API and web applications.
Proficiency in programming languages such as Java, JavaScript or Groovy.
Strong knowledge of RESTful API testing with tools like Postman, SoapUI or Katalon Studio.
Experience with web automation frameworks such as Selenium WebDriver, Cypress, Playwright or Katalon Studio.
Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines and tools such as Jenkins, GitLab CI or Azure DevOps.
Familiarity with version control systems like Git.
Ability to identify, track and report defects using tools like JIRA or Azure DevOps.
Domain experience testing and automating ERP systems will be highly regarded.
  
HOW TO APPLY
  
Join Elders and make a real impact in a collaborative, fast-paced environment. Grow your automation skills, enjoy a modern working environment and help deliver high-quality solutions. For a confidential discussion, contact Caitlin Shears at EGM Recruitment.
